word: H242 - אֻזֵּן שֶׁאֱרָה - ʼUzzên Sheʼĕrâh - ooz-zane' sheh-er-aw' - Uzzen-sherah

sections.paragraph:
Original: אזּן שׁארה

Transliteration: 'ûzzên she'ĕrâh

Phonetic: ooz-zane' sheh-er-aw'

BDB Definition:

Uzzen Sherah = "portion of Sherah"
  1. city built by Sherah, Ephraim's daughter

Origin: from H238 and H7609

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
